case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. EFREN Y GEBREZGIER

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 75287536) TO PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
